title: Create: Pineapples
description: Ever wanted pineapples in Minecraft... NOW YOU CAN! This mod adds pinecones, crushed pinecones and even pineapples with its juice!
body:
Introducing the new, fantastic create mod add-on! This mod adds lots of different unique features! E.g:
-You can make pineapples out of pinecones and apples
-You can crush pinecones to get experience and spikes
-A new mysterious liquid (pineapple juice) that gives you a special effect

*Updates that could come:
-Automated pinecone farming
-Mugolio (pinecone syrup)

Thanks for downloading! :)
